title: Partner With Us
text:
Working with Lincoln Laboratory
Through several mechanisms, Lincoln Laboratory provides opportunities for sharing innovative research while protecting the intellectual property developed under government sponsorship. The TTO facilitates such partnerships to advance R&D and increase U.S. technical competitiveness.
